/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/assets/ces_logo.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/assets/chip_logo.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/assets/penguin_logo.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/assets/txn_logo.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/assets/user_image.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/driver_backends.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/mouse_cursor_icon.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/rtc_util.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/simulator_util.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/indev_backends/evdev.c.o CMakeFiles/lvglsim.dir/src/lib/display_backends/fbdev.c.o -o bin/lvglsim  liblvgl_linux.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl.a -levdev -lm -lpthread -lasound -lmosquitto
